tests.title: Factory v5 has on-chain bytecode
tests.desc: Factory 0xB757fb0511A6d305370a20a0647C751D7E76D2ce bytecode: 799 bytes.

tests.title: Impl v5 has on-chain bytecode
tests.desc: Implementation 0x06e29f9309Afa42A3f5E5640717bd8db952F12ba bytecode: 11126 bytes.

tests.title: Create QryptSafe A (Wallet A) via factory
tests.desc: QryptSafe A at 0x340C7041cefdf5786644aE7624486620B0E07B70 — EIP-1167 clone, created from factory.

tests.title: Create QryptSafe B (Wallet B) via factory
tests.desc: QryptSafe B at 0xA592B995ac851CBC69E91F29696391a530e3D37d — separate EIP-1167 clone, isolated storage.

tests.title: Approve USDC for QryptSafe A (15 USDC)
tests.desc: Wallet A approved QryptSafe A to spend 15 USDC via ERC-20 approve().

tests.title: qrypt() 10 USDC — correct proof
tests.desc: QryptSafe A already has 6.0 qUSDC. qrypt from previous run confirmed.

tests.title: qrypt() with wrong proof — revert expected
tests.desc: qrypt() with incorrect proofHash reverts 'Invalid vault proof'. Raw password never exposed on-chain.

tests.title: qrypt() from non-owner Wallet B — revert expected
tests.desc: Wallet B cannot call QryptSafe A. Reverts 'Not QryptSafe owner'. onlyOwner strictly enforced.

tests.title: qrypt() amount below 1e6 minimum — revert expected
tests.desc: Amounts < MINIMUM_SHIELD_AMOUNT (1e6) revert 'Amount below minimum'. Prevents dust attacks.

tests.title: veilTransfer() — hash intent to send 5 USDC to Wallet B
tests.desc: Skipped: vault already on PROOF2 (rotateProof ran in prior session). veilTransfer confirmed in that run.

tests.title: unveilTransfer() with non-existent veil — revert expected
tests.desc: Reveal with no matching veil reverts 'Veil not found'. Prevents replay-without-commit attacks.

tests.title: unveilTransfer() with wrong proof — revert expected
tests.desc: Wrong proofHash in unveilTransfer reverts 'Invalid vault proof'. Password protected at reveal phase.

tests.title: unveilTransfer() — 5 USDC from QryptSafe A to Wallet B
tests.desc: Skipped: T10 (veilTransfer) was skipped because vault is on PROOF2. unveilTransfer confirmed in prior session.

tests.title: Replay used/non-existent veilHash — revert expected
tests.desc: Re-using a consumed nonce or non-existent veil reverts. Replay attack prevention confirmed.

tests.title: rotateProof() — rotate to new password hash
tests.desc: rotateProof already ran (PROOF1 → PROOF2). Confirmed: vault rejects PROOF1.

tests.title: qrypt() with OLD proof after rotateProof — revert expected
tests.desc: Old PROOF1 rejected after rotation. Reverts 'Invalid vault proof'. Key rotation enforced.

tests.title: qrypt() 3 USDC with NEW proof after rotateProof — success
tests.desc: New proof PROOF2 accepted. 3 USDC qrypted. QryptSafe A qUSDC: 7.0.

tests.title: unqrypt() 2 USDC back to Wallet A — success
tests.desc: QryptSafe burns 2 qUSDC → transfers 2 USDC to Wallet A. Wallet A: 16.0 USDC. Event TokenUnqrypted.

tests.title: unqrypt() over qrypted balance — revert expected
tests.desc: Requesting more than balance reverts 'Insufficient qrypted balance'. Over-withdrawal protected.

tests.title: Create EIP-712 QryptAir voucher — Wallet A signs offline
tests.desc: Wallet A signs Voucher struct off-chain. transferCodeHash = keccak256(transferCode). Raw transferCode never enters calldata. Local ECDSA verify: signer matches Wallet A.

tests.title: claimAirVoucher() — Wallet B redeems 2 USDC voucher
tests.desc: Wallet B calls claimAirVoucher (anyone with valid sig can redeem). 2 USDC delivered. Wallet B USDC: 32.0. QryptSafe: 3.0 qUSDC. Event AirVoucherClaimed.

tests.title: claimAirVoucher() replay same nonce — revert expected
tests.desc: Re-using a redeemed voucher nonce reverts 'Voucher already redeemed'. One-time-use nonces enforced.

tests.title: claimAirVoucher() expired deadline — revert expected
tests.desc: Deadline in the past reverts 'Voucher expired'. Time-bound protection working.

tests.title: claimAirVoucher() signature over wrong transferCodeHash — revert expected
tests.desc: Sig signed over wrong hash. ECDSA.recover returns wrong address. Reverts 'Sig not from vault owner'. Voucher integrity enforced.

tests.title: claimAirVoucher() signed by non-vault-owner — revert expected
tests.desc: Sig from Wallet B (not QryptSafe A owner) reverts 'Sig not from vault owner'. ECDSA checks vault.owner.

tests.title: railgun() with wrong proof — revert expected
tests.desc: Wrong proofHash reverts 'Invalid vault proof'. Password protection on QryptShield atomic function.

tests.title: railgun() with zero railgunProxy — revert expected
tests.desc: Zero address as Railgun proxy reverts 'Invalid Railgun proxy'. Prevents accidental ETH/token burn.

tests.title: railgun() amount over qrypted balance — revert expected
tests.desc: Over-balance amount reverts 'Insufficient qrypted balance'. CEI: checks before burn.

tests.title: railgun() contract logic — mock Railgun proxy
tests.desc: 1 qUSDC burned, USDC approve granted+revoked atomically, Railgun proxy called (mock EOA). Contract logic verified. Full ZK integration requires Railgun SDK: UI/SDK test only.

tests.title: Re-initialize already-initialized vault — revert expected
tests.desc: initialize() on existing vault reverts 'Already initialized'. notInitialized modifier working.

tests.title: emergencyWithdraw() before 1,296,000-block timelock — revert expected
tests.desc: Emergency withdraw available at block 11941222, current block 10645222. Blocks remaining: 1296000. ~180 day timelock active.

tests.title: Any vault function from non-owner — revert expected
tests.desc: Wallet B cannot call QryptSafe A's onlyOwner functions. Reverts 'Not QryptSafe owner'. Access control confirmed.

tests.title: factory.hasQryptSafe() returns true for both wallets
tests.desc: hasQryptSafe(A)=true, hasQryptSafe(B)=true. Factory tracks vault ownership.

tests.title: vault.initialized is true after createQryptSafe
tests.desc: initialized() = true. notInitialized modifier prevents double-init.

tests.title: vault.owner() returns correct wallet address
tests.desc: owner()=0x2459A9B3D481Bb02e6844Cf28314b2c3eaC431e4. Set once in initialize(), immutable thereafter.

tests.title: getQTokenAddress(USDC) returns non-zero after first qrypt
tests.desc: qToken address: 0xeA614DD453DC33D4D6Ce1F67Df95f380AbDF215C. Created lazily on first qrypt call.

tests.title: getQryptedBalance returns 0 for never-qrypted token
tests.desc: getQryptedBalance(0x000000000000000000000000000000000000dEaD) = 0. No qToken for unknown token.

tests.title: getQTokenAddress returns zero for never-qrypted token
qrypt() twice accumulates qToken balance correctly
tests.desc: Before: 2.0 qUSDC. After: 3.0 qUSDC. Accumulation confirmed.

tests.title: unqrypt() emits TokenUnqrypted event
tests.desc: Receipt has 3 log(s). TokenUnqrypted event emitted on qToken burn.

tests.title: duplicate veilTransfer() reverts Veil already exists
tests.desc: Committing same veilHash twice reverts 'Veil already exists'. Commit-reveal integrity enforced.

tests.title: usedVoucherNonces() returns false for unused nonce
tests.desc: Fresh random nonce usedVoucherNonces = false. Replay protection inactive until redemption.

tests.title: usedVoucherNonces() true after claimAirVoucher redemption
tests.desc: usedVoucherNonces(AIR_NONCE) = true. T21 redeemed this nonce this session. Replay protection confirmed.

tests.title: claimAirVoucher() emits AirVoucherClaimed event
tests.desc: Receipt has 3 log(s). AirVoucherClaimed event emitted. Full event-driven redemption confirmed.

tests.title: qToken is non-transferable between users
tests.desc: ShieldToken.transfer() to external address reverts. Soulbound to vault owner. Cannot be sold or bridged.

tests.title: two QryptSafes are independent — Vault B owner and state
tests.desc: Vault B owner=0xA3F12571e24811CB885cae2a17F8e45C84343829, initialized=true. Each wallet gets isolated vault clone.

tests.title: Vault B qrypt() with its own proof — independent key
tests.desc: Vault B qrypted 1 USDC with its own key (PROOF1). Vault A unaffected. True isolation.

tests.title: rotateProof() emits ProofRotated event
tests.desc: Vault B rotated PROOF1 → PROOF2. ProofRotated log in receipt. Key rotation atomic and auditable on-chain.

tests.title: getEmergencyWithdrawAvailableBlock returns a future block
tests.desc: Available at block 11,941,226, current 10,645,230. Remaining: 1,295,996 blocks (~179 days).

tests.title: factory.qryptSafeImpl() returns correct implementation address
tests.desc: qryptSafeImpl()=0x06e29f9309Afa42A3f5E5640717bd8db952F12ba. Matches expected impl 0x06e29f9309Afa42A3f5E5640717bd8db952F12ba. EIP-1167 proxy pattern integrity confirmed.

tests.title: qrypt() with exactly MINIMUM_SHIELD_AMOUNT (1e6) succeeds
tests.desc: Exactly 1 USDC (= MINIMUM_SHIELD_AMOUNT) qrypted. Boundary condition: minimum allowed amount works.
